markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content quality and refine the medical review process.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Link Quality Fix:** A researcher regression causing bad links is fixed. The next article batch will be correct, and GrowthX will review the last few weeks' content.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [**MD Tagging Refined:** MD tags will now be reserved for medical claims, not simple facts. This reduces review load and improves focus.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Image Strategy Updated:** New lead images will be less person-focused (tire crops, full face shots). GrowthX will deliver images as links for Biologica to place.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**Content Expansion:** GrowthX is developing a strategy for scalable content (e.g., symptom explainers) that avoids cannibalizing existing keyword authority.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)

## Topics

### Link Quality & Fact-Checking

  - [**Problem:** Recent articles contained broken or unreliable third-party links.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [**Cause:** A researcher regression. The new researcher finds sources (e.g., paywalled papers) that the fact-checker cannot access, preventing it from validating claims.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [**Solution:** Daniel pushed a fix. The next article batch will reflect this.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will review articles from the last few weeks to correct any lingering link issues.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

### MD Tagging Process

  - [**Problem:** The current process is overly conservative, tagging simple facts (e.g., "75% of women experience hot flashes") and creating an unnecessary review burden for Maggie.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will update its instruction set to reserve MD tags for medical claims requiring expert review.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Example:** A fact like "maintain bedroom temps between 60-68°F" is a data point, not a medical claim, and does not require an MD tag if the source is authoritative.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

### Medical Review Enhancements

  - [**Bibliography:** GrowthX will provide a plain-text bibliography with links for each article.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This gives Maggie an easy way to check all sources at once, improving efficiency and helping to identify unreliable sources (e.g., the Sleep Foundation, which is funded by mattress companies).](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [**Source Filtering:** GrowthX will investigate logic to filter out irrelevant sources.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
      - [**Example:** A study on women with HIV should not be used to support a general claim about women's health.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

### Image Strategy

  - [**Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [**Lead Images:** Less person-focused (tire crops, full face shots) to shift focus from "who is this person" to "it is a person."](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
      - [**Interstitial Images:** GrowthX will prioritize generating images that match Biologica's previously approved aesthetic.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
      - [GrowthX will deliver two images per article (lead + interstitial) as links in the Google Doc.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
      - [Biologica will handle image placement to ensure consistent formatting across the site.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
      - [**Recommendation:** Use a CMS image block to allow GrowthX to call the image programmatically, preventing layout issues.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [**Backfill:** After approval of the new style, GrowthX will generate images for all existing articles to replace outdated ones (e.g., those with text overlays).](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

### Content Expansion Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Develop a scalable content strategy with a lighter review burden for Biologica.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Avoid cannibalizing keywords from existing product-focused content while finding topics with enough depth for dozens of articles.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [**Potential Pillars:**](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
      - [Symptom explainers](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
      - [Ingredient education](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [**Status:** Matthew will present concrete options for feedback by Friday or early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### CMS Tagging

  - [**Goal:** Automate CMS tagging to match Airtable's topic clusters (e.g., perimenopause, postmenopause).](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
  - [**Plan:** GrowthX will map Airtable clusters to CMS tags and include them in the article metadata.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
  - [**Future:** This setup enables automated publishing and tagging via API (e.g., Shopify) for large content batches.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
      - [Deliver the next article batch with link fixes, new images, and the updated clinical framework applied.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
      - [Implement the new MD tagging logic.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [Provide a bibliography with each article.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [Present content expansion options by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [Send a folder of new images for all existing articles for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [**Biologica:**](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
      - [Review the next article batch, focusing on link quality, MD tagging, and image style.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
      - [Confirm the utility of the new bibliography format.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [Discuss CMS tag mapping with GrowthX via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/cJza9SBjBj1PDV57fsGJoYzKyyQq2Hz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
